overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player descends stairs into a busy downtown street, walks through covered arcades with vibrant signage, crosses a multi-lane intersection, and continues past an NCPD police station through dense pedestrian crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway descending to busy city street with vehicle traffic

events.description: descending concrete stairs from elevated position to street level
reaching bottom of stairs and continuing forward along sidewalk
entering shadow cast by overhead highway structure

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: large military-style truck driving along the multi-lane road
shirtless man in patterned shorts walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with teal painted railings descending from elevated walkway
massive concrete overpass structure with vehicles visible on upper level
tall palm trees lining the street median
large red illuminated sign with white text reading COMBAT CAB

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view looking down concrete stairs into a bustling futuristic city street. The camera descends to street level and walks along a sidewalk beside moderate traffic, passing a large military truck and pedestrians. Palm trees line the street while an elevated highway structure casts shadows overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon food stalls

events.description: entering covered walkway with prominent purple neon lighting from food stalls
exiting darker covered section into area with more direct sunlight filtering through

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade area, passing neon-lit storefronts and food vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: food vendor stall with intense purple neon lighting and menu displays
steam rising from ground vents creating atmospheric effect
concrete pedestrian bridge crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, where purple neon lights from food stalls illuminate the scene. Steam rises from ground vents as the camera passes under concrete overpasses. The environment shifts from natural sunlight to artificial neon lighting and back to dappled light.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with yellow pedestrian crosswalk under elevated highway

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with tall buildings and crosswalk
waiting at crosswalk signal then proceeding to cross with walk signal illuminated
turning right while crossing the street to head down perpendicular sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for the walk signal, then crossing the multi-lane street with other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: brown SUV driving through the intersection
woman in red jacket and white skirt crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with prominent vertical red neon lighting and digital displays
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with painted WALK text
large digital advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection dominated by a tall building with vertical red neon accents. The camera waits at a yellow crosswalk, then crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while a brown SUV drives past. Steam vents and digital billboards fill the background under the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with NCPD police station and street vendors

events.description: entering denser pedestrian area with NCPD police station signage visible
passing street vendor stall with umbrella and security guard standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking along crowded sidewalk past the NCPD police station, navigating through dense pedestrian traffic and street vendors

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing by umbrella-covered food stall
security guard in brown vest with arms crossed standing near building entrance

entered.detail: blue illuminated sign reading NCPD marking the police station entrance
food vendor stall with green and white striped umbrella
building with distinctive orange facade and geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a densely populated sidewalk area in front of the NCPD police station, marked by a prominent blue sign. The camera passes street vendors with umbrella stalls and a security guard, navigating through heavy pedestrian traffic. The environment features orange building facades and scattered newspaper debris under the perpetual steam vents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet concrete descent into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic city. It begins by moving down stairs to a bustling street level, passing palm trees and a large military truck beneath the shadow of an elevated highway. As the camera enters a covered walkway, the natural sunlight shifts into a moody atmosphere of purple neon lights and rising steam from ground vents. The scene then opens back into the bright light of a wide intersection, where the camera crosses a yellow crosswalk beneath towering buildings with red neon accents and digital billboards. Finally, the movement leads through a crowded sidewalk area in front of an NCPD police station, navigating past umbrella stalls and security guards amidst orange facades and scattered debris.
